bootstrap.author: twoferone
bootstrap.title: One of my twins asked me why the picture went to jail
bootstrap.body:
Because it was framed.

His brother didn't even look up from his cereal, just said "it was probably hung without a fair trial." They're six. I have never been prouder or more threatened in my own home.

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: hope the trial was fair. these cases usually come down to whoever shot first

replies.author: twoferone
replies.body: the courtroom sketch artist just took a photo. lazy work honestly

replies.author: ISO_a_good_time
replies.body: and the appeal was denied because the evidence had already been developed

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: I heard the picture's alibi didn't hold up. it had been cropped

comments.author: prairiedialup
comments.body: in this economy even the pictures are getting framed for things they didn't do. canvas anyone who disagrees

bootstrap.author: beavertales
bootstrap.title: Tourist at the ByWard Market asked me if BeaverTails are made from real beavers
bootstrap.body:
Told her no, but the lineup was dam long anyway.

She laughed. Her husband didn't. And that's how I know exactly which one of them makes the jokes at home.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: you otter be ashamed of yourself

replies.author: beavertales
replies.body: I gnaw what I did. no regrets

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: solid joke. wood recommend

comments.author: compost_mentis
comments.body: dam fine work in this thread. I'd leaf a five star review but the rating system is a bit sappy

bootstrap.author: OttomanEmpire
bootstrap.title: A client asked how I learned upholstery, since I'm fully self-taught
bootstrap.body:
Told her the truth: I just kept recovering from my mistakes.

She stared at me for a good three seconds and then said "I'm not paying extra for that." Fair. The puns are complimentary, like the fabric samples.

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: getting down to brass tacks I see

replies.author: OttomanEmpire
replies.body: careful, that comment could staple this whole thread together

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: I tried upholstery once. couldn't cut it. the whole thing came apart at the seams

comments.author: sump_pump_sam
comments.body: redid one dining chair in 1997 with a manual staple gun and I still talk about it like a war. respect to anyone who does this daily

replies.author: OttomanEmpire
replies.body: the manual staple gun era built character and forearms, in that order

bootstrap.author: ISO_a_good_time
bootstrap.title: My therapist asked how the photography hobby is going
bootstrap.body:
Told her honestly: I'm hoping one day it'll all just click.

She wrote something down. I asked what. She said "progress." I choose to believe her.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: at least you're focusing on yourself. that's the important thing

replies.author: ISO_a_good_time
replies.body: trying. some days I'm just not in a good headspace, other days it's the whole aperture

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: sounds like she's really helping you develop

comments.author: half_marathon_harold
comments.body: my therapist says I use running as avoidance. I told her I'd circle back to that

bootstrap.author: twoferone
bootstrap.title: The twins discovered puns this year. Their teacher sent a note home
bootstrap.body:
Apparently one of them told the class "you can't trust atoms, they make up everything," and when nobody laughed, his brother stood up and said "tough crowd, must be full of negative ions."

The note just says "we know where they get it." No further comment. None needed.

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: "full of negative ions" is honestly advanced work. those kids are going places. detention, but places

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: standing up to defend the bit is what gets me. that's loyalty at the atomic level

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: sodium funny. I slapped my neon that one

comments.author: thesispending
comments.body: grad student here. I regret to inform you these are the exact jokes we still make in the lab. periodically

replies.author: twoferone
replies.body: glad to hear they have a future in academia. all the best elements do

bootstrap.author: beavertales
bootstrap.title: My buddy quit his job at the coffee shop
bootstrap.body:
Said it was the same old grind, day after day.

He's been off a month now and honestly he seems way less depresso.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: a latte people feel that way about their jobs

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: tell him not to be bitter. that's the coffee's job

replies.author: beavertales
replies.body: he says the decision kept him up at night, but that might've been the free espresso

comments.author: LensAndLatte
comments.body: as someone with coffee in my actual username I feel targeted and also seen. this thread is brewtal

drip.author: twoferone
drip.title: Took the twins to the community pool. One asked if it was safe to dive in
drip.body:
Told him I'd looked into it.

The lifeguard heard me and did the slow single nod. She's one of us now. That's how it spreads.

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: solid research. very deep dive

replies.author: twoferone
replies.body: honestly I only skimmed the surface

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: hope the findings hold water

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: this whole thread is going swimmingly and I hate it here

drip.author: beavertales
drip.title: Neighbour asked to borrow my ladder. Had to explain it's a stepladder

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: rungs true to me

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: a story like that really climbs on you

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: you should let it go. every family has a few missing rungs

replies.author: beavertales
replies.body: we don't talk about the extension ladder. he thinks he's better than us

drip.author: ISO_a_good_time
drip.title: I was going to post a joke about time travel

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: I've heard this one next week. still good

replies.author: ISO_a_good_time
replies.body: funny, next week is when I stole it from you

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: came here yesterday to say this exact thing

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: giving this the same review I always will have gave: solid

drip.author: twoferone
drip.title: Asked the twins at breakfast if they know why bees have sticky hair
drip.body:
Because they use honeycombs.

One said "that's un-bee-lievable, dad." The other one just whispered "beehave." The transformation is complete. My work here is done.

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: the hive mind is strong with those two

replies.author: twoferone
replies.body: they finish each other's sentences now. and my jokes. mostly my jokes

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: wax poetic all you want, they're your problem now

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: give it a few years and they'll be pollen these same jokes on their own kids

drip.author: beavertales
drip.title: Told my wife she should learn to embrace her mistakes
drip.body:
She hugged me.

Twenty-two years married. I walked directly into it and honestly? Proud of her.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: she's been holding that one in the chamber for 22 years. that's patience

replies.author: beavertales
replies.body: she says the wedding vows had fine print. I'm starting to believe her

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: the perfect counter-joke doesn't exi—

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: a marriage built on solid framing. this is what we all aspire to

drip.author: OttomanEmpire
drip.title: A customer asked why I was talking to a recliner in my shop
drip.body:
Look. Me and this recliner go way back.

She left without booking anything. The recliner and I agreed it was her loss.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: you should lean into that friendship

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: sounds like a very supportive relationship

replies.author: OttomanEmpire
replies.body: he's always been there for me. mostly because he weighs 40 kilos

comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
comments.body: sofa, so good

drip.author: ISO_a_good_time
drip.title: Entered ten puns in a pun contest, hoping at least one would win
drip.body:
No pun in ten did.

Going to sit with that for a while.

comments.author: twoferone
comments.body: you flew too close to the pun. icarus energy

replies.author: ISO_a_good_time
replies.body: the wax melted, the puns fell. one day it'll all click

comments.author: beavertales
comments.body: devastating. the judges clearly had no sense of pun

comments.author: OttomanEmpire
comments.body: you'll recover. you always do

late_comments.author: OttomanEmpire
late_comments.body: late to this but I heard the picture only got community service. it's hanging around a gallery now

late_comments.author: ISO_a_good_time
late_comments.body: showing up late but glad this thread got such great exposure. the puns really have teeth

late_comments.author: twoferone
late_comments.body: this thread has me on the edge of my seat. which is loose, if you're taking new clients

late_comments.author: beavertales
late_comments.body: hope the next session gives you a more positive outlook. or at least a well-adjusted one

late_comments.author: OttomanEmpire
late_comments.body: arriving late with one more: tell him to look into tea instead. whole different steep learning curve
